scripts.changeset:pre-alpha: pnpm guard:not-main && changeset pre enter alpha
scripts.changeset:pre-beta: pnpm guard:not-main && changeset pre enter beta
scripts.guard:not-main: bash -c '[ "$(git branch --show-current)" != main ] || { echo "ERROR: this command cannot run on main" >&2; exit 1; }'
scripts.version:check-registry: pnpm version:list | while read -r spec; do name="${spec%@*}"; local_ver="${spec##*@}"; npm_ver=$(npm view "$name" version 2>/dev/null || echo 'NOT FOUND'); if [ "$local_ver" = "$npm_ver" ]; then echo "OK  $name@$local_ver"; else echo "MISMATCH  $name: local=$local_ver npm=$npm_ver"; fi; done
scripts.version:list: pnpm ls -r --depth -1 --json | node -e "process.stdin.setEncoding('utf8'); let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>JSON.parse(d).forEach(p=>p.private||console.log(p.name+'@'+p.version)))"
